author: Canny (1986)
title: A Computational Approach to Edge Detection
why: Deteksi tepi klasik yang jadi standar; gampang dipahami, dasar banget CV

author: Harris & Stephens (1988)
title: A Combined Corner and Edge Detector
why: Detektor sudut legendaris, matematika simpel, fondasi feature detection

author: Perona & Malik (1990)
title: Scale-Space and Edge Detection Using Anisotropic Diffusion
why: Filtering pinter yang haluskan gambar tapi jaga tepi; intro anisotropic diffusion

author: Lucas & Kanade (1981)
title: An Iterative Image Registration Technique with an Application to Stereo Vision
why: Optical flow paling dasar, lacak gerakan piksel antar frame

author: Horn & Schunck (1981)
title: Determining Optical Flow
why: Optical flow global klasik, pasangan wajib Lucas-Kanade

author: Shi & Tomasi (1994)
title: Good Features to Track
why: Good Features to Track, nyempurnain Harris buat tracking

author: Lowe (2004)
title: Distinctive Image Features from Scale-Invariant Keypoints
why: SIFT, deskriptor fitur paling ikonik, tahan skala & rotasi

author: Bay et al. (2006)
title: SURF: Speeded Up Robust Features
why: SURF, versi lebih cepat dari SIFT pakai integral image

author: Dalal & Triggs (2005)
title: Histograms of Oriented Gradients for Human Detection
why: HOG buat deteksi orang, dasar sebelum era deep learning

author: Sivic & Zisserman (2003)
title: Video Google: A Text Retrieval Approach to Object Matching in Videos
why: Cari objek di video ala Google pakai bag-of-words visual

author: Csurka et al. (2004)
title: Visual Categorization with Bags of Keypoints
why: Bag-of-keypoints, awal mula klasifikasi gambar pakai visual words

author: Lazebnik et al. (2006)
title: Beyond Bags of Features: Spatial Pyramid Matching for Recognizing Natural Scene Categories
why: Spatial pyramid, tambahin info lokasi ke bag-of-features

author: Viola & Jones (2001)
title: Rapid Object Detection using a Boosted Cascade of Simple Features
why: Deteksi wajah real-time legendaris pakai Haar + AdaBoost cascade

author: Rosenblatt (1958)
title: The Perceptron: A Probabilistic Model for Information Storage and Organization in the Brain
why: Perceptron, nenek moyang semua neural network

author: Rumelhart et al. (1986)
title: Learning Representations by Back-Propagating Errors
why: Backpropagation, cara neural net belajar yang dipakai sampai sekarang

author: LeCun et al. (1998)
title: Gradient-Based Learning Applied to Document Recognition
why: LeNet, CNN pertama yang sukses baca digit tulisan tangan

author: Nair & Hinton (2010)
title: Rectified Linear Units Improve Restricted Boltzmann Machines
why: ReLU lahir di sini, aktivasi yang bikin deep net gampang dilatih

author: Glorot et al. (2011)
title: Deep Sparse Rectifier Neural Networks
why: Deep sparse rectifier, alasan ReLU menang buat jaringan dalam

author: Scherer et al. (2010)
title: Evaluation of Pooling Operations in Convolutional Architectures for Object Recognition
why: Bandingin max vs average pooling, max menang telak

author: Boureau et al. (2010)
title: A Theoretical Analysis of Feature Pooling in Visual Recognition
why: Analisis teori kenapa pooling penting buat recognition

author: Krizhevsky et al. (2012)
title: ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks
why: AlexNet, momen big-bang deep learning menang ImageNet 2012

author: Ciresan et al. (2012)
title: Multi-column Deep Neural Networks for Image Classification
why: Multi-column CNN di GPU, pemecah rekor sebelum AlexNet

author: Hinton et al. (2012)
title: Improving neural networks by preventing co-adaptation of feature detectors
why: Dropout pertama, matiin neuron acak biar gak overfitting

author: Lin et al. (2013)
title: Network In Network
why: Network-in-Network, micro-MLP + global average pooling

author: Simonyan & Zisserman (2014)
title: Very Deep Convolutional Networks for Large-Scale Image Recognition
why: VGG, resep CNN dalam pakai kernel 3x3 ditumpuk, simpel & kuat

author: Zeiler & Fergus (2014)
title: Visualizing and Understanding Convolutional Networks
why: ZFNet, ngintip isi CNN biar ngerti apa yang dipelajari filter
